tasks.task_goal: Mix a homemade vinaigrette by combining oil and vinegar in a container
tasks.expected_outcome: A stable, well-emulsified dressing with no visible separation
required_tool_attributes: leak-proof lid to contain liquids during rapid motion
rigid walls to transmit oscillatory force
textured, grippable exterior for secure handling
sufficient headspace to allow fluid sloshing
durable seal that withstands repeated shaking

tasks.task_goal: Activate an aerosol spray paint can before painting a metal railing
tasks.expected_outcome: Pigment and propellant are fully mixed, producing an even spray pattern
required_tool_attributes: internal mixing ball to agitate settled pigment
sealed, rigid cylindrical body to handle inertial forces
hand-sized diameter for reliable grip
solvent-resistant interior lining
intact spray valve that remains closed while shaking

tasks.task_goal: Reset an old-style mercury-in-glass thermometer to below room temperature

required_tool_attributes: sealed glass tube to contain the liquid metal
dense mercury column responsive to inertial flicking
elongated stem to generate acceleration when shaken
grippable end section for control
sufficient structural integrity to withstand repeated motion
